value: Adequately capitalized near-term; profile hinges on LOQTORZI ramp and capital access
source_page_or_section: Liquidity & Risk Factors; Q1 2026 earnings release
notes: Orion Analysis (preliminary): near-term credit position is supported by a net-cash balance sheet and a covenant-light, interest-only 2029 term loan with substantial minimum-liquidity headroom, so default risk over the next ~12 months appears low. Outlook: cautiously stable, watch burn rate, LOQTORZI trajectory, and pipeline readouts. Underlying support: 10-Q Liquidity/Risk Factors and cash-flow statement; Q1 2026 earnings release.
